payload.compiled_summary: OpenWAM: review Probe OpenWAM through artifact://environment-spec/eng_openwam_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for OpenWAM. Checklist OpenWAM pack links to the intended environment spec(s), OpenWAM adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, OpenWAM anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using OpenWAM for using openwam as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside thermofluids and chemistry workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_openwam_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for OpenWAM without a typed contract tied to openwam executable workflows for thermofluids and chemistry workflows.. Runtime eng-openwam/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-openwam:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_openwam_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_openwam_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/cd0be843-bd6a-5d3e-ab00-7758d10fb8df.
